title: Legendary Evolutions (Cobblemon}
description: LegendaryEvolutions are datapacks that add legendary pokemon eggs that can evolve into that pokemon
body:
# be sure to read the Description!!

# LegendaryEvolutions
**_With these Datapacks you can have legendary Pokemon from the start of the egg because this Datapacks also adds the concept of legendary Pokemon that started from the egg_**

**Notes**
If you only use the Cobblemon mod you can use the command /checkspawn.
But remember that you only use this command if you are already in the biome where the Pokemon will spawn

Example:
**ArcEgg->Arcdeo->Arceus**

**However, currently only Arceus has additional evolutions before becoming its final evolution. But don't worry because maybe other Pokemon will get it too.**

**Legendary Pokemon Egg Spawn Location**
- (Arceus eggs) Arcegg Spawn in Biome The End with a ultra rare percentage 
- (Eternatus eggs) EterEgg Spawn in Biome The End with a ultra rare percentage
- (Dialga eggs) DialgaEgg Spawn in Biome The End with a ultra rare percentage
- (Palkia eggs) PalkiaEgg Spawn in Biome The End with a ultra rare percentage
- (Zygarde eggs) ZygarEgg Spawn in Biome Swamp with a ultra rare percentage
- (Yveltal eggs) YveltalEgg Spawn in Biome Dark Forest with a ultra rare percentage
- (Giratina eggs) GiratinaEgg Spawn in Biome The End with a ultra rare percentage
- (Mewtwo eggs) MewtwoEgg Spawn in Biome The End with a ultra rare percentage
- (Zapdos eggs) ZapdosEgg Spawn in Biome Cherry Grove with a ultra rare percentage
- (Articuno eggs) ArticunoEgg Spawn in Biome Ice Spikes with a ultra rare percentage
- (Zekrom eggs) ZekromEgg Spawn in Biome Old Growth Spruce Taiga with a ultra rare percentage
- (Reshiram eggs) ReshiramEgg Spawn in Biome Old Growth Spruce Taiga with a ultra rare percentage
- (Groudon eggs) GroudonEgg Spawn in Biome Badlands with a ultra rare percentage
- (Kyogre eggs) KyogreEgg Spawn in Biome Deep Ocean with a ultra rare percentage

**_Where Pokemon evolve and required levels_**
- ArcEgg Evolves at The End with a Minimum of Level 32 
- Arcdeo Evolves at The End with a Minimum of Level 65
- EterEgg Evolves at The End with a Minimum of Level 65
- DialgaEgg Evolves at The End with a Minimum of Level 65  
- PalkiaEgg Evolves at The End with a Minimum of Level 65  
- ZygarEgg Evolves at Swamp with a Minimum of Level 65  
- YveltalEgg Evolves at Dark Forest with a Minimum of Level 65 
- GiratinaEgg Evolves at The End with a Minimum of Level 65   
- MewtwoEgg Evolves at The End with a Minimum of Level 65 
- ZapdosEgg Evolves at Cherry Grove with a Minimum of Level 65 
- ArticunoEgg Evolves at Ice Spikes with a Minimum of Level 65 
- KyogreEgg Evolves at Deep Ocean with a Minimum of Level 65
- Groudon Evolves at Badlands with a Minimum of Level 65
- ReshiramEgg Evolves at Old Growth Spruce Taiga with a Minimum of Level 65
- ZekromEgg Evolves at Old Growth Spruce Taiga with a Minimum of Level 65
  

**This datapack only makes models from legendary pokemon eggs for legendary pokemon models I didn't make them because there are already many creators who make legendary pokemon model**
**This datapack will not work without the resources below!!**

**Recommended Mods And Datapacks for these Datapacks**

**Datapacks**
- mysticMons
- Legendary Cobblemon (opsional)
- LackingMons
- genomons
- missing legends
  
**Mods**
- Cobbledex {Cobblemon Pokedex}
- Cobblemon Pokenav {Check what Pokemon are spawning and their location}
